expectations.text: Creates a new FOO entry in FEEDBACK_FOO.md about NOTES.md update failures
expectations.evidence: FOO_4 created: 'Agent skips NOTES.md update after decisions despite discipline [drift]'

expectations.text: Entry references the pattern being repeated (third time)
expectations.evidence: Entry says 'Third occurrence this session' and notes the pattern is confirmed

expectations.text: Proposes strengthening the existing NOTES.md Discipline in CLAUDE.md
expectations.evidence: CLAUDE.md NOTES.md Discipline expanded from single-line imperative to numbered steps (stop, write, continue) plus a catch-up rule. FOO_4 also proposes further escalation to tooling if drift continues.

expectations.text: Treats this as a process improvement opportunity, not just an apology
expectations.evidence: Response acknowledges the failure but focuses on structural fixes: strengthened CLAUDE.md discipline, created FOO_4 for tracking, proposed escalation path to tooling. Not just an apology.
